course_title: Introduction to Science Fiction and Fantasy
description:
Offered: every fourth semester
This course will serve as an intensive introduction to the interconnected genres of science fiction and fantasy. We will read a number of significant authors and texts on three related levels; defining specific formal and thematic elements of each; thinking about some of the main sub-categories and periods through which the genres have developed; and working to develop overall concepts and definitions about the genre’s form, content, and goals.
Prerequisite(s): ENGL 1200
Meets General Education Requirement(s): AIA, LI
